entries.title: ADR-002 dsn-001: Config Type Placement — unimatrix-server owns UnimatrixConfig
Service Replacement in unimatrix-server Generates 26x Compile Cycles Without Targeted Test Scoping
UDS Observation Log: operator-togglable debug visibility via unimatrix_server::obs target
